CustomField.description: Formula field. Generates a display label for this installment, showing the installment number in parentheses for open-ended Recurring Donations or as "X of Y" for fixed-length schedules. Used in Opportunity naming conventions.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The installment label for this Recurring Donation Opportunity, such as "(3)" for open-ended or "(3 of 12)" for fixed-length schedules.
CustomField.label: Recurring Donation Installment Name
